EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An unknown/bad event from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is blocked
An unknown/bad event from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is detected and logged
An alert is generated for an unknown/bad event from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port}
An unknown/bad event from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is rejected
